slo_context.purpose: To ensure the reliability and accuracy of financial data for timely and correct reporting.

data_freshness_slo.reasoning: To ensure data is up-to-date for the morning dashboard.
data_freshness_slo.breach_impact: Stale data leads to incorrect financial reports for merchants.

quality_threshold_slo.reasoning: To maintain high data quality for accurate financial analysis.
quality_threshold_slo.breach_impact: Low-quality data results in erroneous financial insights.

row_count_slo.reasoning: To account for variability in daily transaction volumes.

pipeline_runtime_slo.reasoning: To allow sufficient time for daily processing before the morning dashboard cutoff.
pipeline_runtime_slo.breach_impact: Exceeding runtime delays data availability for the morning dashboard.
